arts.ttl: Plymouth vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Devon to face Plymouth Argyle in the fourth round of the FA Cup this afternoon. During midweek, the Reds booked their place in the Carabao Cup final with an accomplished 4-0 victory over Tottenham. Arne Slot will be without Trent Alexander-Arnold at his disposal as the defender recovers from a thigh injury. arts.ttl: ‘I couldn't stop scoring with my Liverpool strike partner - but we didn’t get on'
arts.sum: Stan Collymore and Robbie Fowler formed a formidable partnership at Liverpool in the mid-90s, but the former has now opened up on their relationship - or lack thereof - off the pitch

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle vs. Liverpool: Should Arne Slot risk Diogo Jota in FA Cup or prioritise Premier League glory?
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Diogo Jota is in line to feature against Plymouth Argyle on Sunday in the FA Cup, but some fans fear it would be a mistake to allow him to start.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot changed transfer plans after finding out what Liverpool staff long knew
